name: Baoding Tianwei Baobian Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Baoding Tianwei Baobian Electric Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells power transformers and high technology power equipment in China. It offers phase-shifting, generator step-up, transmission, HVDC converter, gas insulated, traction, and shell type transformers, as well as shunt reactors. The company also exports its products. Baoding Tianwei Baobian Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is based in Baoding, China.
